headline: Here's Why Investors Should Add NI to Their Portfolio Right Now

headline: UTF: Still A Buy But Not The Bargain It Was
summary: Cohen & Steers Infrastructure Fund (UTF) remains a buy, supported by AI-driven power demand and a 7.1% yield, despite a shrinking NAV discount.
